normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 (Scheme Text)
version_date: Consolidation updated to include AMD 16 (GG 24 February 2026); original scheme gazetted 27 May 2016
scope_summary: District local planning scheme for the City of Melville (Perth metropolitan area, also subject to the Metropolitan Region Scheme), revoking Community Planning Scheme No 5 (gazetted 14 December 1999). It reserves land, zones the district (Residential, Centre C1-C4, Mixed Use, Service Commercial, Light Industry, Private Clubs/Institutions/Places of Worship, Special Use), sets the zoning table (Table 3), additional uses (Table 4) and restricted uses, adopts the R-Codes (cl 25, modified by cl 26 split-coding rules) and SPP 3.6 (cl 27) as part of the Scheme, and sets additional site and development requirements (cl 32, Table 7) with a variation power (cl 34). It is read with the deemed provisions in Schedule 2 of the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015.

quality_flags: zoning table (Table 3) rotated column headers extracted as reversed/scrambled character strings (e.g. line 'la itn e d is e r t n e C ...'); zone-column mapping for use permissibility symbols must be reconstructed with care
some zoning table rows interleave stray characters from rotated text and footnote markers (e.g. 'community purpose', 'consulting rooms', 'convenience store' rows)
page headers/footers ('City of Melville LPS 6', page numbers) interleaved through body text
amendment table column order ambiguous in extraction (gazettal vs updated dates); original gazettal 27/05/16 confirmed by 'Original Town Planning Scheme Gazettal May 2016' header
WAPC/Ministerial signature dates on execution pages are blank in this consolidated electronic copy (normal for DPLH consolidations)
document is the DPLH electronic consolidation with disclaimer that it is not the legal version
